EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation that address change has been made.
EmailTemplate.name: Correspondence Address Change
EmailTemplate.subject: Change of Details
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge and for confirming your new correspondence address. We have added the details to your account.
If you have any questions, then please do not hesitate to get in touch.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
